zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathaniel Childe於1591年5月5日出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，他的父親Wolstone Childe21歲，母親Ellen Empson22歲。他於1621年6月4日與Isabell Treadway在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1647年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沙安被列為husbandman。他去世於1647年在英國巴金哈姆爾沙安享年56歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nathaniel Childe于1591年5月5日出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，他的父亲Wolstone Childe21岁，母亲Ellen Empson22岁。他于1621年6月4日与Isabell Treadway在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1647年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾沙安被列为husbandman。他去世于1647年在英国巴金哈姆爾沙安享年56岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: Nathaniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a New Testament name, which is derived from the Greek form of a Hebrew name meaning ‘God has given’ ( compare Nathan , which is sometimes taken as a short form of this name). It was borne by one of the less prominent of Christ's apostles (John 1:45; 21:2), who in fact is probably identical with Bartholomew . The spelling used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament is Nathanael , but this is in much less frequent use as a given name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Nathaniel Childe was born on 5 May 1591, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, his father, Wolstone Childe, was 21 and his mother, Ellen Empson, was 22. He married Isabell Treadway on 4 June 1621, in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 9 daughters. In 1647, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as husbandman in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1647, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nathaniel Childe est né le 5 mai 1591, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Wolstone Childe, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ellen Empson, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Isabell Treadway le 4 juin 1621, à Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 9 filles. En 1647, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est husbandman à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1647, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nathaniel Childe am 5. Mai 1591 in Westminster, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wolstone Childe 21 und seine Mutter Ellen Empson 22. Er hat am 4. Juni 1621 in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom Isabell Treadway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 9 Töchter. 1647, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als husbandman in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1647 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Childe è nato il il 5 maggio 1591 nel Westminster, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Wolstone Childe, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Empson, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Isabell Treadway il 4 giugno 1621, nel Westminster, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 9 figlie. Nel 1647, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come husbandman nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1647, nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Engl: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアチャルフォント スト ペター
ja.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Childeが1591年5月5日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父Wolstone Childeは21歳，母Ellen Empsonは22歳であった。1621年6月4日にイギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターでIsabell Treadwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。1647年，56歳の時，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムでの職業はhusbandmanと記録されている。彼は1647年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムで56歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Ste: 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치

ko.St Botolph Without-Aldgate, London, Midd: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프 위토우트 알드가트
ko.Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Ste: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Childe(이)가 1591년 5월 5일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wolstone Childe(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Empson(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1621년 6월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터에서 Isabell Treadway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1647년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 husbandman이었다. 그는 1647년 영국 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Childe nasceu em 5 de maio de 1591, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Wolstone Childe, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Empson, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabell Treadway em 4 de junho de 1621, em Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 9 filhas. Em 1647, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como husbandman em Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1647, em Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathaniel Childe родился 5 мая 1591 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Wolstone Childe было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ellen Empson, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabell Treadway 4 июня 1621 г. в местности вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 9 дочерей. В 1647 году, в возрасте 56 лет,  он работал по профессии husbandman в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1647 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nathaniel Childe nació el 5 de mayo de 1591, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Wolstone Childe, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Ellen Empson, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Isabell Treadway el 4 de junio de 1621, en Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 9 hijas. En 1647, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era husbandman en Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1647, en Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
